title: CLANG compiler warnings
body:
---


Author Name: **Iztok Jeras** (@jeras)
Original Redmine Issue: 818 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-09-05
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Hi, clang reports the next warning many times (50+), there might be other warnings also, I can check if this one gets fixed:

```
../V3Number.h:100:48: warning: use of logical '&&' with constant operand [-Wconstant-logical-operand]
         return ( (m_valueX[bit/32] & (1UL<<(bit&31))) && 1);
                                                       ^  ~
../V3Number.h:100:48: note: use '&' for a bitwise operation
         return ( (m_valueX[bit/32] & (1UL<<(bit&31))) && 1);
                                                       ^~
                                                       &
../V3Number.h:100:48: note: remove constant to silence this warning
         return ( (m_valueX[bit/32] & (1UL<<(bit&31))) && 1);
                                                      ~^~~~


```
Regards,
Iztok Jeras
